name: precision: markdown headings and table rows in narration are not claims
note: From the 400-issue dogfood report. A scoreboard table the agent rendered to the user got split into rows-as-claims. Headings ('## What I'd build') got reified too.
claim:
## Updated scoreboard
| Model | Pass | ConfIdx |
| DeepSeek Chat | 6/10 | 17% |
| Qwen 2.5 | 5/10 | 22% |
| GitHub stars | 3 | n/a |
